property.name: fs.defaultFS
property.description: Default Hadoop HDFS filesystem scheme and host

property.name: hadoop.tmp.dir
property.description: A base for other temporary directories.

property.name: hadoop.proxyuser.hive.hosts
property.description: Hosts from which HiveServer2 is allowed to proxy users

property.name: hadoop.proxyuser.hive.groups
property.description: User groups that HiveServer2 is allowed to proxy
